name: 30ct Christmas Tissue Paper White/Blue/Navy - Wondershop™
description:
This 30-Count Banded Christmas Gift Tissue Paper from Wondershop™ will take your gift packaging to the next level. This pack includes 30 sheets of banded tissue paper, each measuring 16.5 inches x 24 inches. Designed in solid blue, white and navy hues, they're great for filling gift bags for Christmas or any other occasion.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
